Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit — זהות צרופה interface *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Frequency stage: master-detail squares, dark start, restyled cue; display dark start-up *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: raise calibration panel above #q-header so the right frequency column is tappable *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Calibration: dark \(#282828\) tile inverted — dark dots on cream, distinct '\\''weave'\\'' animation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Calibration: 4th tile concentric-diamond animation \(in-family\); readable confirm cue with halo *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add auto '\\''ghost hand'\\'' gesture demo — first wired on the frequency stage *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency stage: empty-left start, tap → large + grow-in '\\''המשך'\\'' button, self-run ghost-hand demo *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency demo: skip intro, start 2s after stage is visible, play once \(no loop\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency stage: 1.5s demo delay, persistent dimmed '\\''המשך'\\'' button, uniform tile gaps, no corner hand flash *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency demo: hand glides in from below \(no sudden pop\); ring + fade cue on frequency pick *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Globe \(origin\) stage: invert colours — light plate, gold globe \(cream/dark continents\), gold map land *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add shared bottom band \(rule+instruction+button\) to non-frequency stages *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency stage uses the shared bottom band too \(band moved top → bottom\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Band button is the sole forward trigger: no more auto-advance on pick *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bottom band: raise the added rule; instruction sits between it and the bottom grid line, button drops below the line *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bottom band: raise the added rule further; button now sits between the two grid lines *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Drop the added rule; raise bottom grid line by 100 \(706→606\); put instruction+button below it *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bottom grid line raised 50 \(not 100\): y606→656; instruction+button follow down with it *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bottom band: lower the instruction text by 20 \(closer above the button\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bottom band: lower the button by 20 too *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix band button: force text to --grid-dot \(המשך was invisible dark-on-dark on frequency\); press turns text + dotted frame orange \(no solid fill\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Origin input phase: keyboard+input row+add button follow the raised bottom line \(706→656\); move '\\''הזן את ארצות המוצא'\\'' to the bottom note and switch the button to '\\''הזנתי, אפשר להמשיך'\\'' *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Band instruction reveals with a one-shot typewriter on stage entry \(re-types only on a real text change, e.g. globe→input phase\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Frequency commit: the picked frequency grows/zooms to fill the frame while the chrome fades — a hand-off into the globe stage \(lock 0.55→0.7s\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Globe entry: title '\\''איפה הסיפור שלך מתחיל?'\\'' types in LARGE + centred, then shrinks to its corner, then the globe reveals; use the new dotted title art *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Bump stage1.css v147 so the gated story-title reveal actually loads \(v146 was cached from before the gating → title revealed at rest, no big-centred intro\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Globe choreography: schedule via setTimeout not rAF, so it reliably runs \(single rAF was being deferred → big-title intro never played, title stayed at rest\) *)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -q -m 'Redeploy nudge: retrigger Netlify build for the latest commits \(globe intro\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Resting story-title larger \(--story-w 50vw/680 → 56vw/760\) so its dots read bigger/clearer at rest *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Globe stage: raise story title so line 2 clears the bottom grid line; nudge globe left \(right 780→870\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Globe stage ghost-hand demo: open hand glides in → fist spins the globe to Asia → pointing finger taps it \(marks black\) → open hand presses סימנתי; plays once, resets, cancels on real touch *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix symbol window on the origin stage: fireStageContinue no longer nulls st._stageContinue, so the two-phase finish \(סימנתי → הזנתי\) fires advance\(\) → symbol window \(single-press stages already worked\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Touch-screen cursor: no cursor at rest; appears only while pressing/dragging — open-hand flash \(0.5s\) → finger \(press\) / fist \(drag\) → fades out on release *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Cursor: with a MOUSE show it always \(open on hover → finger/fist on press/drag → open on release\) for testing; TOUCH still only shows it during a press/drag and fades out on release \(pointerType split\) *)

Bash(git commit -q -m 'Instruction texts move to the content rectangle'\\''s TOP-RIGHT corner \(20px inside the top + right grid lines\), right-aligned; the continue button stays in the bottom band *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Fix: origin stage '\\''הזנתי, אפשר להמשיך'\\'' now opens the symbol window *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add symbol sound: play public/sounds/symbolsound.mp3 whenever the symbol window opens \(in sync with the symbol appearing on the display screen\) *)

description: Impeccable design detector: runs after Edit/Write/MultiEdit on UI files and surfaces findings as system reminders.
